scenarios.title: spec.md flags API path as deferred with bug back-link

gherkin.when: the Deferred / Non-Goals section is read
gherkin.then: it lists the X API polling path, contains the BUG-015-001 deprecation rationale, and R-008 is no longer in the live Requirements list

scenarios.title: scopes.md Scope 6 is Deferred not Reopened

gherkin.then: its status reads Deferred, the rationale links to BUG-015-001, and no checkbox is marked [ ] VERIFIED FAIL

scenarios.title: uservalidation item 13 is non-applicable not failing

gherkin.then: item 13 is rendered as a strikethrough non-applicable entry and points to BUG-015-001

scenarios.title: state.json certifies done with scope-6 deferred

gherkin.when: status, certification, and resolvedBugs fields are read
gherkin.then: status and certification.status are done, completedScopes is scope-01..05, scope-6 status is Deferred, and resolvedBugs contains BUG-015-001

scenarios.title: Governance scripts pass on the amended spec

gherkin.when: artifact-lint and traceability-guard are run against specs/015-twitter-connector

scenarios.title: Unit tests remain green (no production code change)

gherkin.then: it exits 0 and the twitter package passes
